summary: Lists all serial ports on the system as a table — port name, description, vendor/product IDs, and which TouchDesigner Serial DAT (if any) currently owns the port. Useful for picking the right COM port at startup.
common_gotchas: Read-only — this DAT inspects, it doesn't open ports. Use Serial DAT for actual I/O.
On macOS, expect both `/dev/cu.*` and `/dev/tty.*` entries; prefer `cu.` for outgoing connections.
